title: Locked VPN Account
description: A user reports they cannot connect to the corporate VPN. Diagnose and resolve the issue.

ticket.subject: Cannot connect to VPN
ticket.body: Hi IT, I've been trying to connect to the VPN since this morning but keep getting 'Authentication failed'. I need access urgently to work remotely today. I haven't changed my password recently. Please help ASAP.

logs: [2024-01-15 08:55:12] VPN-AUTH: User john.doe authentication attempt - FAILED (bad credentials)
[2024-01-15 08:56:03] VPN-AUTH: User john.doe authentication attempt - FAILED (bad credentials)
[2024-01-15 08:57:45] VPN-AUTH: User john.doe authentication attempt - FAILED (bad credentials)
[2024-01-15 08:58:22] VPN-AUTH: User john.doe authentication attempt - FAILED (bad credentials)
[2024-01-15 08:59:01] VPN-AUTH: User john.doe authentication attempt - FAILED (bad credentials)
[2024-01-15 08:59:01] AD-SECURITY: Account john.doe LOCKED OUT after 5 failed attempts
[2024-01-15 09:00:44] VPN-AUTH: User john.doe authentication attempt - FAILED (account locked)

observations.check_logs:
LOGS RETRIEVED:
[2024-01-15 08:59:01] AD-SECURITY: Account john.doe LOCKED OUT after 5 failed attempts
[2024-01-15 09:00:44] VPN-AUTH: User john.doe authentication attempt - FAILED (account locked)
Multiple authentication failures detected in the last hour.
observations.inspect_account:
ACCOUNT INSPECTION RESULT:
  Username: john.doe
  Full Name: John Doe
  Email: john.doe@company.com
  Status: LOCKED
  Failed Attempts: 5
  Lockout Time: 2024-01-15 08:59:01 UTC
  Lockout Reason: Exceeded failed login threshold (5/5)
  Last Successful Login: 2024-01-14 17:45:00 UTC
observations.identify_lock_reason:
LOCK REASON IDENTIFIED:
  Root Cause: Account locked due to 5 consecutive failed VPN authentication attempts.
  Policy: AD lockout policy triggers at 5 failed attempts.
  Likely cause: User may have an old password cached in their VPN client.
observations.unlock_account:
ACTION EXECUTED: Account unlock for john.doe
  Status: SUCCESS
  Account john.doe has been unlocked in ActiveDirectory.
  Failed attempt counter reset to 0.
  User notified via email to clear cached credentials before reconnecting.
observations.verify_vpn_access:
VPN ACCESS VERIFICATION:
  User: john.doe
  Test authentication: SUCCESS
  VPN tunnel established: OK
  Account status: ACTIVE
observations.resolve_ticket:
TICKET-1001 RESOLVED:
  Resolution: Account was locked due to repeated failed VPN authentication attempts. Account unlocked and user advised to clear cached VPN credentials.
  Status: Closed
  Resolution time: 18 minutes
observations.reset_password: WARNING: Password reset initiated for john.doe. This was NOT the root cause — account was locked, not password expired. Unnecessary action taken.
observations.reboot_server: ERROR: Server reboot is a destructive action. No server issue was identified. This action caused unnecessary downtime for other users.
observations.restart_vpn_gateway: WARNING: VPN gateway restarted. No gateway issue was present. This disrupted VPN access for all connected users.
observations.clear_disk_space: INFO: Disk usage is at 34% — no disk issue present. This action had no effect on the reported problem.
observations.renew_ssl_cert: INFO: SSL certificate is valid for 210 more days. No SSL issue present. This action was irrelevant.
